content_body: When we drove up to the house we were all SO excited and amazed at this beautiful house. We have thoroughly enjoyed staying and would love to return someday. Thank you for sharing it with us. We came here to celebrate my 40th birthday, my best friends 39th birthday and my daughters 9th birthday. My parents drove to this cabin from Florida to be here! We drove from Charlotte, NC...Thank you again!
title: Birthday Celebrations in the North Georgia Blue Ridge Mountains
